description_long: This is a solid-body electric guitar with a classic single-cutaway design, featuring a sunburst finish on the front and a black finish on the back. The body is contoured and made of wood, with a white pickguard and two visible pickups, one near the bridge and one near the neck. The neck is made of a lighter wood, likely maple, and features a dark fingerboard with visible fret markers. The headstock is angled and fitted with six inline tuning pegs, typical of many iconic electric guitars. Chrome hardware, including control knobs and a bridge, is present, adding to the instrument's visual appeal. The overall construction and finish suggest a high-quality, durable instrument suitable for urban street performances or music venues.
description: A sunburst-finished, single-cutaway electric guitar with a white pickguard, chrome hardware, and a maple neck. It features two pickups and six inline tuning pegs.
description_view_0: A narrow side profile showing the guitar's thin body and the protruding tuning pegs at the headstock.
description_view_1: The back view reveals a solid black finish and the full length of the neck and headstock.
description_view_2: Another side profile, opposite to view 0, highlighting the body thickness and the neck's alignment.
description_view_3: The front view displays the sunburst finish, white pickguard, two pickups, control knobs, and the full fretboard.
attribute_headstock_design: Angled headstock with six inline tuning pegs, no visible logo, classic Telecaster-style shape
